title: DPCC – Trainee – 150 Posts

basic_details.job_title: DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DPCC Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 150 vacancies across Delhi. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 17-05-2026, and closes on 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DPCC website, dpcc.delhi.gov.in.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of advertisement (inclusive of date of publication) uploaded on DPCC website

selection_process: Merit based on GATE/NET Score (2023 or later); if insufficient candidates, merit based on qualifying examination marks
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the website https://dpcc.delhi.gov.in as per the link provided therein. Application in physical form or any other form will not be accepted/entertained and will be summarily rejected.
seo_tags: Delhi Pollution Control Committee Trainee Recruitment 2026
